findings.headline: Armani Prive opens its post-founder era with back-to-back couture shows
findings.summary: Paris Haute Couture Week (July 6-9) runs today through Thursday; Giorgio Armani Prive closes Tuesday July 7 with two back-to-back shows, the house's first couture outing since Giorgio Armani's death in September 2025. Valentino is notably absent from this edition's calendar.
findings.why_it_matters: 창업자 사후 첫 쿠튀르 무대라는 서사 자체가 화제성을 만든다 — 구찌는 창의적 리더십 교체기에도 쿠튀르급 스펙터클이 없다는 공백이 이번 주 더 도드라진다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: The narrative of a first post-founder couture show is itself generating buzz - Gucci's lack of a couture-level stage stands out more sharply this week during its own creative transition.

findings.headline: Prada Group's Q1 2026 growth slows to 14% as Versace turnaround stays on plan
findings.summary: Prada Group posted net revenues of 1.428 billion euros in Q1 2026 (+14% reported, +3% organic), with Versace contributing 143 million euros in its first full quarter under Prada ownership, in line with internal targets. Management flagged a 'highly complex' and uncertain macro environment even as Americas and APAC led growth.
findings.why_it_matters: 프라다가 베르사체 인수 후 마진 희석을 감수하며 이탈리아 럭셔리 플랫폼을 키우는 전략 — 구찌의 케링 내 위상과 직접 비교되는 '통합 스케일' 벤치마크다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: Prada is building an Italian luxury platform through the Versace deal even while accepting margin dilution - a direct benchmark for Gucci's own scale-and-integration position within Kering.

findings.headline: Miu Miu holds the top spot on the Lyst Index as searches keep climbing
findings.summary: Miu Miu retained the No.1 position in the Q1 2026 Lyst Index with quarterly searches up 8%, placing three of its own products in the index's global top 10 hottest items simultaneously - a first for any brand tracked by Lyst. Miu Miu's own Q1 retail sales grew a comparatively modest 2.4% at constant currency per Prada Group's Q1 report.
findings.why_it_matters: 검색 열기와 실제 소매 매출 성장률(2.4%) 사이 간극이 크다 — 화제성이 곧바로 매출로 전환되지 않는다는 점을 구찌의 자체 버즈 지표 해석에도 적용해야 한다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: There is a wide gap between search buzz and actual retail growth (only 2.4%) - a caution Gucci should apply to its own buzz metrics: hype does not automatically convert to revenue.

findings.headline: Zegna goes ex-dividend and confirms new CEO appointment from June AGM
findings.summary: Ermenegildo Zegna NV goes ex-dividend today (July 6) with a $0.1368/share payout, payable July 29, following the June 26 AGM where shareholders formally approved Gianluca A. Tagliabue as Executive Director and Group CEO. Q1 2026 revenue rose 2.5% to 470.2 million euros, driven by 14% DTC organic growth.
findings.why_it_matters: 리테일 직접판매 중심 성장(DTC +14%)이 완만한 전체 매출 성장(+2.5%)을 지탱 — 구찌의 DTC 전환 전략과 비교할 수 있는 동종 이탈리아 하우스 사례다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: DTC-led growth (+14%) is propping up otherwise modest total revenue growth (+2.5%) - a comparable Italian-house case study for Gucci's own direct-to-consumer push.

findings.headline: Burberry's incoming chair William Jackson joins the board as Murphy prepares exit
findings.summary: William Jackson, founder of Bridgepoint Group, formally joined Burberry's board as a non-executive director on July 1 and will stand for election at the July 15 AGM, ahead of succeeding Gerry Murphy as chair when Murphy retires in November. The move was announced alongside Burberry's return to annual profit.
findings.why_it_matters: 실적 반등과 맞물린 이사회 리더십 교체 — 구찌·케링도 실적 반등기 지배구조 메시지를 시장에 어떻게 짤지 참고할 사례다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: A board leadership handover timed with a return to profit - a reference case for how Gucci/Kering could frame governance messaging during its own turnaround phase.

findings.headline: Analysts model modest Moncler Q2 growth as H1 earnings near
findings.summary: Morgan Stanley models roughly 5% constant-currency Q2 retail sales growth for Moncler (about 3 points from new retail space, 2 points like-for-like), with H1 2026 results due July 22 and full-year group revenue seen reaching 3.25 billion euros. Coverage flags slowing US momentum and European tourism risk as swing factors.
findings.why_it_matters: 아우터웨어 최강자도 미국 수요 둔화·유럽 관광객 변수를 안고 있다 — 구찌가 의존하는 관광객 매출 회복 시점을 가늠하는 참고 지표다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: Even outerwear's strongest performer faces US demand softness and European tourist-flow risk - a useful gauge for when Gucci's own tourist-dependent sales might recover.

findings.headline: Cucinelli documentary heads to theaters as brand keeps double-digit growth
findings.summary: 'Brunello: The Gracious Visionary,' Giuseppe Tornatore's docudrama about the founder, opens theatrically July 24 in the US, Canada, UK and Ireland after its Shanghai International Film Festival premiere; the brand posted 14% Q1 revenue growth to 369.1 million euros and reaffirmed roughly 10% growth guidance for 2026.
findings.why_it_matters: 저마진·저속 성장을 의도적으로 고수하며 '절대적 럭셔리' 포지셔닝을 지키는 대조적 모델 — 구찌의 볼륨-프라이싱 전략 논쟁에 참고할 반례다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: A deliberately slow-growth, lower-margin model built to protect 'absolute luxury' positioning - a useful counter-example in Gucci's own volume-versus-pricing debate.

findings.headline: Ferragamo stock still waiting on a turnaround catalyst ahead of July 30 earnings
findings.summary: Market commentary continues to describe Ferragamo shares as resting on brand strength alone, with investors awaiting a clearer signal from the group's next earnings release, now dated July 30, following the action plan launched after a first-half loss.
findings.why_it_matters: 턴어라운드 중인 경쟁사가 뚜렷한 촉매 없이 정체 — 구찌가 리브랜딩 속도로 격차를 벌릴 수 있는 시간이지만, 동시에 이탈리아 럭셔리 전반의 수요 약세를 시사하는 신호이기도 하다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: A turnaround rival remains stalled without a clear catalyst - a window for Gucci to widen its lead through relaunch pace, but also a signal of broader softness in Italian luxury demand.

keep.headline: Martin Margiela's personal archive goes under the hammer during couture week
keep.summary: A landmark 200-piece auction of Martin Margiela's personal collection took place July 9 in Paris, with a pre-sale exhibition running July 4-8 alongside the couture shows.
keep.why_it_matters: 디자이너 아카이브가 경매로 현금과 화제성을 동시에 만드는 흐름 — 구찌 아카이브 자산의 활용(전시·한정판·리세일) 전략에 참고할 사례다.
keep.why_it_matters_en: Designer archives are becoming cultural and commercial assets; a reference point for how Gucci monetizes its own archive.

keep.headline: Valentino Beauty signs Dakota Johnson and Alexander Skarsgard as fragrance faces
keep.summary: Valentino Beauty named Dakota Johnson and Alexander Skarsgard the faces of an upcoming fragrance chapter built around modern intimacy and emotional expression.
keep.why_it_matters: A급 할리우드 듀오로 향수 사업을 키우는 발표 — 구찌 뷰티의 앰배서더 라인업·향수 매출과 정면으로 겹치는 경쟁 수다.
keep.why_it_matters_en: An A-list duo to grow fragrance - directly overlaps with Gucci Beauty's ambassador and scent business.
